'''âng-p-y-sh''' ('''kangapyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anastamose|anastamose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anastamose|anastamose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-p-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kangapyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingapyeshoko|thingapyeshoko]] || [[word:jingapyeshoko|jingapyeshoko]] || [[word:shingapyeshoko|shingapyeshoko]] || [[word:kingapyeshoko|kingapyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungapyeshoko|thuthungapyeshoko]] || [[word:jujungapyeshoko|jujungapyeshoko]] || [[word:shushungapyeshoko|shushungapyeshoko]] || [[word:kukungapyeshoko|kukungapyeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngapyeshoko|thĂŠngapyeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠngapyeshoko|jĂŠngapyeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠngapyeshoko|shĂŠngapyeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠngapyeshoko|kĂŠngapyeshoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shangapyeshithi|shangapyeshithi]] || [[word:shangapyeshiji|shangapyeshiji]] || [[word:shangapyeshishi|shangapyeshishi]] || [[word:shangapyeshiki|shangapyeshiki]]
